english_forum.title: Plugin: Kanban for Bases
english_forum.author: sleroq
english_forum.content_html:
Decided to stop waiting and build the Kanban View for bases.

kanban view screenshot1920×1110 243 KB

Some notable features:

  • Drag & drop cards between columns with smooth animations
  • Edit properties inline (with autocomplete suggestions!)
  • Batch select and move multiple cards at once (Shift/Cmd/Ctrl + click)
  • Custom backgrounds with blur/brightness controls
  • Auto-migrate your old Kanban boards from the non-bases kanban plugin
  • Plays nice with Pretty Properties for custom tag colors

Try it: Install via BRAT - https://github.com/sleroq/cumban .

  • If you have old Kanban board - you can try migrating it with “Migrate legacy kanban board to bases“ command (don’t worry, it will leave the board intact, but will add properties to every linked note on it)

Why I made it: There’s a certain satisfaction in building the tool you need rather than waiting for someone else’s vision of it. I wanted a Kanban that works exactly how I work - opinionated, a bit experimental.

Still a lot of things on the todo list - search, batch editing of properties, card covers, keyboard navigation, card blockers, etc - but it’s pretty usable right now. I decided to share it early to keep momentum and avoid burning out on it.

Let me know if you run into any issues or have feature requests!
english_forum.ai_summary: 把 Obsidian 原生 Bases 变成支持拖拽的看板视图。
english_forum.ai_pain_point: 旧看板插件数据与 Bases 属性割裂，或重建旧看板极度繁琐。
ai_highlights: 无需手动重建，一键将旧看板数据自动迁移至 Bases 属性中。
按住 Shift 键批量选中卡片，大幅提升任务状态整理速度。
看板内直接编辑属性并自动补全，无需反复打开单个笔记。
english_forum.ai_comment: 既然官方还在慢吞吞，社区大佬直接把“下一代看板”喂到你嘴边，还不快吃？

github_opened.body:

- [x] I attest that I have done my best to deliver a high-quality plugin, am proud of the code I have written, and would recommend it to others. I commit to maintaining the plugin and being responsive to bug reports. If I am no longer able to maintain it, I will make reasonable efforts to find a successor maintainer or withdraw the plugin from the directory.

## Repo URL

<!--- Paste a link to your repo here for easy access -->
Link to my plugin: https://github.com/andrewbowley/interstitial-journal

## Release Checklist
- [x] I have tested the plugin on

  - [x]  Linux

  - [ ]  iOS _(if applicable)_

  - [x] `manifest.json`
  - [ ] `styles.css` _(optional)_
- [x] GitHub release name matches the exact version number specified in my manifest.json (_**Note:** Use the exact version number, don't include a prefix `v`_)
- [x] The `id` in my `manifest.json` matches the `id` in the `community-plugins.json` file.
- [x] My README.md describes the plugin's purpose and provides clear usage instructions.

      I have given proper attribution to these other projects in my `README.md`.
github_opened.ai_summary: 用间隙日记法降低记录门槛，随时捕捉灵感。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 面对空白日记本无从下笔，或频繁切换任务导致心流被打断。
ai_highlights: 一键插入时间戳，解决面对空白页不知从何下手的尴尬。
在当前笔记直接记录，避免频繁切换窗口导致的思路中断。
随心所欲的碎片化书写，缓解长文写作带来的心理压力。
github_opened.ai_comment: 终于有个插件不逼你写长篇大论了，适合那些脑子比手快的人。

github_opened.ai_pain_point: 手动管理笔记效率低下，缺乏智能化的本地代理工具
ai_highlights: 面对重复性笔记整理任务，提供自动化代理以节省时间
覆盖 Windows 与 macOS 桌面环境，满足主流办公需求
引入新代理工具，为用户扩展自动化工作流的选择
github_opened.ai_comment: PR 描述全是套话，名字叫 Agent 别让我失望啊，希望不是又个套壳。

github_opened.ai_summary: 本地AI代理入驻，离线环境也能智能处理笔记
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 担心笔记隐私泄露，或受限于网络无法使用AI助手
ai_highlights: 隐私场景 -> 本地运行模型，敏感数据无需上传云端
整理笔记时 -> 自动分析内容，批量生成双向链接与标签
检索旧笔记时 -> 自然语言对话，快速定位目标笔记内容
github_opened.ai_comment: 名字起得像个孤岛，希望别把你的脑子也困在里面；Agent插件都快烂大街了，希望能有点真本事。

链接式管理图片节点，画布布局更清爽
github_opened.ai_comment: Obsidian 官方把 Canvas 的链接节点做得像个只能看文字的瞎子，这个插件算是给配了副隐形眼镜。

github_opened.ai_pain_point: 文件夹层级太深难找，标签太多太乱，两种管理方式割裂导致笔记归档犹豫。
ai_highlights: 将标签筛选功能直接融入文件资源管理器视图中
消除文件夹与标签系统的割裂，统一管理界面
辅助用户解决笔记存放位置与标签分类的纠结
github_opened.ai_comment: 只测了桌面端就敢揽瓷器活？移动端和 Linux 用户在角落瑟瑟发抖，别是又一个跑路前的烂尾工程。

复习笔记时通过颜色区分信息层级，瞬间锁定核心观点
github_opened.ai_comment: 终于不用在白底黑字的“无聊海洋”里捞针了，护眼又省心。

github_opened.ai_comment: 虽然把Windows/Linux用户拒之门外有点败人品，但对只想在iPhone上看几篇笔记的苹果用户来说，这简直是救命稻草。

github_opened.author: ericvanjohnson
github_opened.body:
# I am submitting a new Community Plugin

- [x] I attest that I have done my best to deliver a high-quality plugin, am proud of the code I have written, and would recommend it to others. I commit to maintaining the plugin and being responsive to bug reports. If I am no longer able to maintain it, I will make reasonable efforts to find a successor maintainer or withdraw the plugin from the directory.

## Repo URL

<!--- Paste a link to your repo here for easy access -->
Link to my plugin: https://github.com/phparch/ultimate-todoist-sync-reborn

## Release Checklist
- [x] I have tested the plugin on
  - [ ]  Windows
  - [x]  macOS
  - [ ]  Linux
  - [ ]  Android _(if applicable)_
  - [ ]  iOS _(if applicable)_
- [x] My GitHub release contains all required files (as individual files, not just in the source.zip / source.tar.gz)
  - [x] `main.js`
  - [x] `manifest.json`
  - [x] `styles.css` _(optional)_
- [x] GitHub release name matches the exact version number specified in my manifest.json (_**Note:** Use the exact version number, don't include a prefix `v`_)
- [x] The `id` in my `manifest.json` matches the `id` in the `community-plugins.json` file.
- [x] My README.md describes the plugin's purpose and provides clear usage instructions.
- [x] I have read the developer policies at https://docs.obsidian.md/Developer+policies, and have assessed my plugin's adherence to these policies.
- [x] I have read the tips in https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines and have self-reviewed my plugin to avoid these common pitfalls.
- [x] I have added a license in the LICENSE file.
- [x] My project respects and is compatible with the original license of any code from other plugins that I'm using.
      I have given proper attribution to these other projects in my `README.md`.

## Extra notes
This is a fork of the existing plugin.

{
    "id": "ultimate-todoist-sync",
    "name": "Ultimate Todoist Sync",
    "description": "Todoist task synchronization.",
    "author": "HeroBlackInk"
  },

The existing plugin has not been updated in over 3 years, and because of a deprecation in how Todoist handles API calls, it is broken and no longer functions. Despite an issue being opened and a pull request submitted to the original project, the current maintainer has not responded.

This release corrects the API issue and allows the plugin to work correctly. It also includes general coding updates to bring the codebase up to current standards.
github_opened.ai_summary: Todoist同步插件重生，Obsidian内直连管理跨平台任务。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 需要在Obsidian记笔记时同步管理Todoist任务，避免频繁切换App导致任务状态更新滞后或遗漏。
ai_highlights: 双向实时同步任务状态，在Obsidian打勾即更新Todoist。
修复旧版同步失效痛点，承诺长期维护，避免半途而废。
无需切回网页端，在笔记界面直接管理每日待办清单。
github_opened.ai_comment: 旧插件坟头草都三尺高了，希望这次“Reborn”别是诈尸。

- [x] I have tested the plugin on
  - [x]  Windows
  - [x]  macOS
  - [ ]  Linux
  - [ ]  Android _(if applicable)_
  - [x]  iOS _(if applicable)_
- [x] My GitHub release contains all required files (as individual files, not just in the source.zip / source.tar.gz)

  - [x] `manifest.json`
  - [x] `styles.css` _(optional)_
- [x] GitHub release name matches the exact version number specified in my manifest.json (_**Note:** Use the exact version number, don't include a prefix `v`_)

github_opened.ai_summary: 一键为笔记添加封面图，告别枯燥白底，视觉体验升级。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 想要Notion式的封面美感，却只能忍受Obsidian原生界面的干瘪与单调。
ai_highlights: 在笔记顶部添加封面图，瞬间将枯燥文档变为精美杂志风格。
自由缩放与偏移调整，让任意尺寸的图片都能完美适配窗口。
文件夹列表直接显示封面，通过视觉特征秒速定位目标笔记。
github_opened.ai_comment: 终于不用对着白纸发呆，这插件强行把Obsidian从“程序员记事本”拉回了现代审美。

github_opened.ai_summary: 告别原生简陋编辑，在笔记内享受IDE级编码体验。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 在Obsidian中编写代码时，原生编辑器缺乏语法提示和自动补全，导致写长代码时极易出错且格式混乱。
ai_highlights: 在编辑复杂代码逻辑时，提供自动补全和括号匹配，减少低级语法错误。
查阅长篇代码片段时，复用VS Code的高亮和配色，显著降低阅读负担。
修改笔记内代码无需跳转外部编辑器，直接在当前页面完成即时调试。
github_opened.ai_comment: 原生编辑器写代码简直就是用石头刻碑，这个插件终于让程序员的双手回到了键盘上。

github_opened.ai_summary: 一眼揪出乱码元凶，从此告别编码和链接的隐形坑
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 多语言混输或复制粘贴时，隐藏的非ASCII字符导致文件链接失效、代码报错或编码乱码，排查耗时耗力
ai_highlights: 规避中文名破坏链接，确保创建 Wiki 链接时路径正确无误
防止混输特殊符号引发编码报错，避免辛苦写的文档打不开
高亮显示粘贴代码中的异常字符，防止因全角符号导致的运行失败
github_opened.ai_comment: 除非你只用英文写作，否则这就是你的“数字显微镜”，专门帮你把那些看不见的捣乱字符揪出来暴打一顿。

github_merged.ai_comment: 终于不用像个强迫症一样在设置面板里反复横跳了，这种“一键换脑”才是对懒人的最高致敬。

github_merged.ai_summary: 在 Obsidian 内直接发布到 Bluesky，告别繁琐的复制粘贴。
github_merged.ai_pain_point: 想分享笔记时需反复切换应用、登录账号并手动调整格式，打断创作心流。
ai_highlights: 无需离开笔记库，在 Obsidian 完成写作后即可直接发送到 Bluesky。
无需手动排版，将带有格式的笔记直接发布到社交网络不再繁琐。
享受私密写作体验，确认内容无误后即可直接推送到公开平台。
github_merged.ai_comment: 终于有人管管那些想在 Bluesky 上念经的用户了，这下连浏览器都懒得开了。

ai.overview: 今天的插件简直是来报恩的！终于把原生Bases拖成了看板，强迫症狂喜。还在忍受简陋代码？快换上IDE级编辑器。Canvas死板？现在能直接预览图片了。图片路径失效、粘贴乱名？Github直传和自动重命名专治各种不服。连Todoist同步都重生了，配合间隙日记，记录效率直接起飞。装完这几个，Obsidian怕是要变成操作系统，准备好上瘾了吗？
